ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock in Rs */,
  "pe_ttm" REAL /* Price to Earnings (TTM) ratio */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock in Cr */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock for 1 year (%) */,
  "net_profit_qtr" REAL /* Net profit of the stock for the quarter in Cr */,
  "net_profit_annual_growth" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the stock's net profit (%) */,
  "operating_revenues_qtr" REAL /* Operating revenues of the stock for the quarter in Cr */,
  "revenue_growth_qtr" REAL /* Quarterly growth rate of the stock's revenue (%) */,
  "price_to_book_value" REAL /* Price to Book Value ratio of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last data update for the stock */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the stock (e.g., active, delisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent industry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the industry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent sector */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the sector is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_capitalizations" (
  "market_capitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market capitalization range */,
  "market_capitalization_range" TEXT /* Range of market capitalization (e.g., Small Cap, Mid Cap, Large Cap) */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* The lower bound of the market capitalization range */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* The upper bound of the market capitalization range */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the market capitalization range is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_capitalization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_industry" (
  "stock_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-industry mapping */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date when the stock was first categorized under the industry */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the stock was last categorized under the industry (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industry_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industry_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sector" (
  "stock_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-sector mapping */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date when the stock was first categorized under the sector */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the stock was last categorized under the sector (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_market_capitalization" (
  "stock_market_capitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-market capitalization mapping */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "market_capitalization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market capitalization range */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date when the stock was first categorized under the market capitalization range */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the stock was last categorized under the market capitalization range (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_market_capitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_market_capitalization_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_market_capitalization_market_capitalization_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_capitalization_id") REFERENCES market_capitalizations ("market_capitalization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data point */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* The adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the notification is important */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who sent the notification (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
